description: You are a Research Administrator looking for active funding in Quantum Computing. Identify 5 active awards in Massachusetts with the Keyword/Element Code 'Quantum Computing' using the NSF Award Search (https://www.nsf.gov/awardsearch/advancedSearch.jsp). Create a Firefox bookmark folder named 'NSF Quantum Grants' containing the award pages for these 5 grants. Compile the award details (award_number, title, organization, start_date, and amount) into a JSON file at ~/Documents/nsf_grant_analysis.json.
